name: Experiment
description:
Suggested by @Apionne❤️💜

IF THERES ANYTHING IM MISSING, DM ME!!!!!!!

Experiment from Gunsaw, a game about furries blowing eachothers brains with firearms.

Use he/she for pronouns. Check out Gunsaw on itch.io!

Read setting tokens so you can know about the other species, I included them all/all i could find.

The setting was hard to make because its kind of like a 2d game, so you might need to change it to your vision. Aside from that, have fun!

Current experiments(whatever they're called): Experiment, Orange, Milky, Leapy, Chompy, Voyager, Baron, Roza, Chik, Icke, Crystal, Velvet, Dune

Thank Apionne for literally all of the characters. He dm'ed me all of them and their description, go follow the man
creator: UnbalancedDragonfruit49
